retry_reason: Failure indicates no primary interface is selected or active; this condition is not expected to change transiently within a short interval, so retrying would likely yield the same error.
contract_summary: This get-wrapper acquires a reference to the active primary hard interface of the B.A.T.M.A.N. mesh, if one exists and is active. On success, it transfers ownership of the referenced batadv_hard_iface to the caller via the output parameter; the caller must release this reference with batadv_hardif_put when done. On failure (no primary selected or not active), it returns -ENOENT and does not transfer any reference. The function temporarily holds a reference to the mesh net_device, which is released before returning.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to acquire a reference to the active primary hard interface via batadv_primary_if_get_selected and return it to the caller via an output parameter. The only additional logic is a status check and cleanup of a transient net_device reference.

check.reason: The get operation from batadv_primary_if_get_selected correctly represents the acquisition of a reference on the hard_iface that is passed to the caller via *primary_if. The access path and type chain match the code and callee information. The put operation entry is rejected because it incorrectly uses 'return' as the location; the put does not correspond to an object that flows out of the function, and the location/index is inconsistent with the function's interface.
